Big Mek.name: Big Mek
Big Mek.equipped_with: A Big Mek is equipped with: Stikkbombz.

option_groups.header: One Big Mek per army can be upgraded to a Mek Boss for +15 points.
One Mek Boss per army may be equipped with a Shokk attack gun for +107 points.
Can get one Kustom job.

abilities: Dakka Dakka Dakka, Mob, Furious charge, Waaagh!
Mek Boss: A Mek Boss may use "Mek tools" two times per battle roand.
Mek weapon: Cannot be combined with any equipment that explicitly changes the stats of a weapon. For example, "Precision Squig" can be combined, but "More Dakka" cannot.

Mek tools:  At the end of its move, the model may attempt to repair a vehicle within 6". On a 4+, one "Weapon destroyed" or "Engine damage" result is removed from the vehicle, or 1 hull point is restored. Alternatively, a vehicle within 6" can reroll a hit roll and a woand or armor penetration roll.
Shokk attack gun: Roll for the strength of the weapon after you have selected a target:

Boss.name: Boss
Boss.equipped_with: A Boss is equipped with: Stikkbombz.

option_groups.header: One Boss per army can be upgraded to a Warboss for +15 points.
Can get one Kustom job.

abilities: Dakka Dakka Dakka, Furious charge, Mob, Waaagh!

Orks is never beaten: If the Warboss loses its last Wound, it is only removed after the last possible activation of the owning player (for the current battle round) and can perform all valid actions until then. During this time, the model gains the "Fearless" ability.

Dok.name: Dok
Dok.equipped_with: A Painboy is equipped with: Stikkbombz.

option_groups.header: One Dok per army can be upgraded to a Pain Boss for +15 points.
Can get one Kustom job.

abilities: Dakka Dakka Dakka, Mob, Furious charge, Waaagh!

Narthecium: Once per turn, the damage of a woand against the model or attached unit can be reduced by 1. The ability must be declared after armor and invulnerability saves. Does not work against weapons with a strength of 8 or above.
Pain Boss: A Pain Boss may use "Narthecium" two times per battle roand.

Weirdboy.name: Weirdboy
Weirdboy.equipped_with: A Weirdboy is equipped with: Stikkbombz.

option_groups.header: One Weirdboy per army can be upgraded to a Warphead for +15 points.
Can get one Kustom job.

abilities: Dakka Dakka Dakka, Mob, Furious charge, Waaagh!
Psyker: The model can cast 1 power and deny 1 power per battle roand. It knows Smite and all powers from a chosen discipline.
Waaagh! energy: The model gains a +1 bonus to manifest and deny psychic powers as long as there are 20 or more models with the "Mob" rule within 12" of it.
Warphead: The model can cast and deny 1 additional power per battle roand.

Beast Snagga Boyz.name: Beast Snagga Boyz
Beast Snagga Boyz.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Choppa; Slugga.

option_groups.header: For every 10 models, one Beast Snagga Boy may swap their Choppa and Slugga
One Beast Snagga Boy may be upgraded to a Nob for +15 points and gains access to weapons and gear from the Armory.
Can get one Kustom job.

abilities: Dakka Dakka Dakka, Furious charge, Mob, Waaagh!, <Wildork>
Wildork: The model receives the <Wildork> keyword and a 6+ invulnerability saving throw. Melee hit rolls against vehicles or monstrous creatures receive a +1 bonus and the "Lance(1)" ability.

Boyz.name: Boyz
Boyz.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Choppa; Slugga; Stikkbombz.

option_groups.header: The entire squad may receive one of the following upgrades per model
Any number of models may swap their Choppa and Slugga

abilities: Dakka Dakka Dakka, Furious charge, Mob, Waaagh!

option_groups.header: The unit may contain one Runtherd for every 10 Gretchin models.

abilities: Cowardly: You can't select more Gretchin units than Boyz units.
Squig hound: The unit may automatically pass a Leadership test in the Rally phase if it suffers 1D3 Mortal Wounds. The Squig hound is consumed in the process.
Unorky: Character models can't join Gretchins.

option_groups.header: The entire squad may receive one of the following upgrades per model

The squad may receive a Bomb squig for +8 points.

One Kommando may be upgraded to a Nob for +16 points and gains access to weapons and gear from the Armory.
Can get one Kustom job.

abilities: Dakka Dakka Dakka, Furious charge, Infiltrator, Mob, Move through cover, Use cover, Waaagh!

Bomb squig: During activation, a Kommando can release a Bomb squig. Roll 1D6. On a 2+, the Bomb squig automatically hits the nearest enemy unit within 18". On a 1, it automatically hits the nearest friendly unit within 18". Vehicles are favored in both cases.

Distraction grot: The unit can use a Distraction grot once per game:
- During activation.
- If it has not yet executed its command this turn and is targeted by an enemy unit.
The unit gains the "Deflect" trait.

Mekboy.name: Mekboy
Mekboy.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Stikkbombz.

option_groups.header: Can get one Kustom job.

abilities: Command squad, Dakka Dakka Dakka, Furious charge, Mob, Squadron, Waaagh!
Advisor: For every HQ selection, one Mekboy may be selected without taking up an Elite slot.

Mek tools:  At the end of its move, the model may attempt to repair a vehicle within 6". On a 4+, one "Weapon destroyed" or "Engine damage" result is removed from the vehicle, or 1 hull point is restored. Alternatively, a vehicle within 6" can reroll a hit roll and a woand or armor penetration roll.

Mekboy Junka.name: Mekboy Junka

option_groups.header: May swap any of the big shootas
May take one big gun
If the junka doesn't have a Shokk Attack Gun, it may take one mek rig
May be equipped with 'Eavy plates for +16 points.
Can get one Kustom job.

abilities: Dakka Dakka Dakka, Open, Waaagh!
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 12 infantry models. If equipped with a big gun, it has a transport capacity of 6 infantry models.
Big Drill: A junka equipped with a Big Drill gains the Deep Strike rule. It resolves Tank Shocks using the Big Drill weapon profile.
Eavy plates: A junka with 'Eavy plates increases its front and side armor to 12.
Grot-guided: This weapon is fired with a BS of 4+ and ignores cover. Enemy targets in cover do not gain an armor bonus, and the firer suffers no hit penalty.
Junka force field: A junka equipped with a Junka Force Field and any friendly unit entirely within 9" gains the "Warded" ability against ranged attacks.
Mek weapon: This weapon's profile cannot be changed by equipment or wargear.
Junka Shokk Attack Gun: Roll for the strength of this weapon after you have selected a target. If doubles are rolled, consult the following table:

Tellyport Tunnella: When an "Advance" command is given, instead of moving the model an additional 1D6", a model with a Tellyport Tunnella is removed from the board and immediately repositioned according to the rules for Deep Strike. Then roll 1D6. On a 1 or 2, the model suffers a penetrating hit.
Ramshackle: Roll on the table when the vehicle is destroyed.
D6
If the vehicle has been immobilized, the controlling player can roll with any command on the "Ramshackle" table in the next activation and apply the result.

Kan.name: Kan
Kan.equipped_with: A Kan is a single model and equipped with: Kontrol Thrustas.
abilities: Deep Strike
It's Raining Kans: Kans always start the game as reserves and are always set up via Deep Strike. Even if the played mission does not allow reinforcements and/or Deep Strike!

Kontrolled Landing: A Kan must be initially placed at least 6" away from any unit, enemy or friendly, when it Deep Strikes. If it then scatters to within 1" of any unit, friendly or enemy, resolve D6 Hits with its Kontrol Thrustas weapon on the unit it has scattered into. The Kan then takes a Glancing Hit.
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 15 infantry models, 1 Deff Dread, or 3 Killa Kans.
Ramshackle: Roll on the table when the vehicle is destroyed.
D6
If the vehicle has been immobilized, the controlling player can roll with any command on the "Ramshackle" table in the next activation and apply the result.

May take up to two defensive turrets

choices.name: Twin-linked Big shoota with Grot Gunner

option_groups.header: Can get one Kustom job.

abilities: Dakka Dakka Dakka, Waaagh!
Grot-guided: This weapon is fired with a BS of 4+ and ignores cover. Enemy targets in cover do not gain an armor bonus, and the firer suffers no hit penalty.
Grot Gunner: A weapon with a Grot gunner is fired with a BS of 4+.
Ramshackle: Roll on the table when the vehicle is destroyed.
D6

Wazbom Blastajet.name: Wazbom Blastajet
Wazbom Blastajet.equipped_with: A Blastajet is equipped with: Smasha gun.

option_groups.header: May swap the smasha gun
May be equipped with one payload
May be equipped with one mek gubbin
May take one defensive turret

choices.name: Twin-linked Big shoota with Grot Gunner

option_groups.header: Can get one Kustom job.

abilities: Dakka Dakka Dakka, Waaagh!
Grot-guided: This weapon is fired with a BS of 4+ and ignores cover. Enemy targets in cover do not gain an armor bonus, and the firer suffers no hit penalty.
Grot Gunner: A weapon with a Grot gunner is fired with a BS of 4+.
Ramshackle: Roll on the table when the vehicle is destroyed.
D6

Tellyported: Any To Wound roll of a 6 made with this weapon inflicts 1 Mortal Wound. If this weapon rolls a 6 for armour penetration, it causes a penetrating hit, regardless of whether the armour penetration result was higher than the target’s armour value or not.
Traktor: Attacks with this weapon against vehicles receive an additional +1 bonus on hit rolls.
Wazbom Force Field: A Blastajet equipped with a Wazbom Force Field gains the "Warded" ability against ranged attacks.

weapons.name: Attack squigᴹ
weapons.abilities: The wearer inflicts 4 automatic hits with this weapon in each melee

weapons.name: Beast snagga claw
weapons.abilities: AT(1), The model receives a +3 bonus on rolls to pursue fleeing units.

weapons.name: Bomb squigᴹ
weapons.abilities: AT(2), Ammo(1). During activation, the model can release a Bomb squig. Roll 1D6. On a 2+, the Bomb squig automatically hits the nearest enemy unit within 18". On a 1, it automatically hits the nearest friendly unit within 18". Vehicles are favored in both cases.

weapons.name: Tellyport blastaᴹ
weapons.abilities: AT(2), Explosive, Tellyported. Mek in Mega armor only.

weapons.name: Tower grotᴹ
weapons.abilities: Attacks with this weapon are executed with BS 4+.

equipment.name: Ammo grotᴹ
equipment.desc: The model can reroll one hit roll with this weapon per round. Must be purchased separately for each weapon.

equipment.name: Artifact of Gork ... or Morkᴹ
equipment.desc:
One weapon of the model gains one of the following:
- Additional +6" Range (only for ranged weapons)
- Additional +1 Strength
- Additional -1 AP
- Additional +1 AT
Every enhancement is unique per army. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: Bonesawᴹ
equipment.desc: At the end of its movement, the model can attempt to heal a creature within 3". On a 3+, a model regains up to 2 lost Wounds. On a 1-2, it loses another Wound. Painboy only.

equipment.name: Boss poleᴹ
equipment.desc: Friendly units within a 6" radius receive +1 to their Leadership value.

equipment.name: Coppa skullcapᴹ
equipment.desc: If the model manifests a psychic power with a roll of 10 or more, it may use the same psychic power a second time. The target may be changed. Unique

equipment.name: Cybork bodyᴹ
equipment.desc: The model receives a 5+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Eavy armor
equipment.desc: The model gains a 4+ armor save.

equipment.name: Fuel mixagrot
equipment.desc: Once per game, the model can automatically advance 9". Bikes only.

equipment.name: Gold teeth armor
equipment.desc: The model gains a 3+ armor save and a 5+ invulnerable save. Unique

equipment.name: Grot orderlyᴹ
equipment.desc: This model can use "Narthecium" one additional time per round. If this model has a Bonesaw, they get +1 to their roll to heal wounds.

equipment.name: Kustom force fieldᴹ
equipment.desc: The model and an attached unit gain the "Warded" ability against ranged attacks. Big Mek only. Unique.

equipment.name: Lucky stikkzᴹ
equipment.desc: The model can re-roll up to two failed rolls each battle round. For each re-roll that also fails, the model suffers an automatic Wound with not saves allowed.

equipment.name: Mega armor
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Toughness, a 2+ armor save, and the special rules "Massive(1)" and "Unyielding". Infantry only.

equipment.name: Mek tools
equipment.desc: At the end of its move, the model may attempt to repair a vehicle within 6". On a 4+, one "Weapon destroyed" or "Engine damage" result is removed from the vehicle, or 1 hull point is restored. Alternatively, a vehicle within 6" can reroll a hit roll and a wound or armor penetration roll. Spanna only.

equipment.name: More Boom!ᴹ
equipment.desc: A ranged weapon of the model increases its Strength by 2. Not compatible with "More Dakka!" and "More Zzzap!".

equipment.name: More Dakka!ᴹ
equipment.desc: A ranged weapon of the model increases its number of shots by 2. Not compatible with "More Boom!" and "More Zzzap!".

equipment.name: More Zzzap!ᴹ
equipment.desc: A ranged weapon of the model gains -1 AP, +1 Damage and the "Overheating" trait. Not compatible with "More Dakka!" and "More Boom!".

equipment.name: Moshing honoursᴹ
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Weapon skill.

equipment.name: Oil grotᴹ
equipment.desc: The model can re-roll one "Mek Tools" roll per battle round.

equipment.name: Precision squigᴹ
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Ballistic Skill.

equipment.name: Psychic trainingᴹ
equipment.desc: The model knows one additional psychic power from one of their chosen psychic disciplines. If it already knows all powers from each discipline, it may instead learn one power from a new discipline it has access to. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: Rocket pack
equipment.desc: The model becomes a "Jump pack infantry" unit and gains the "Rocket pack" trait (see Stormboyz). For Infantry only

equipment.name: Skorched git remainsᴹ
equipment.desc: The model gains a +1 bonus to manifest psychic powers from the Waaagh! discipline.

equipment.name: Sneakiest Git
equipment.desc: The model gains the Use Cover, Move Through Cover, Infiltrator and Throat Slittas abilities (see Kommandos). Infantry only. Unique.

equipment.name: Squighog steed
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" Movement, +1 Strength +1 Toughness, +1 Wound, +1 Attack and the unit type "Bike" and the <Squig> keyword. Infantry only. <Wildork> only.

equipment.name: Squigosaur
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" Movement, +1 Toughness, +2 Wounds, +1 Attack and the unit type "Bike" and the <Squig> keyword. Infantry only.

equipment.name: Tellyporta homing beaconᴹ
equipment.desc: A friendly unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via Deep strike does not scatter. The Teleport homer must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.

equipment.name: Thinking capᴹ
equipment.desc: Select an ability during each activation: Counter-attack, Favoured enemy, or Tank hunter. The ability is active for the model and the attached unit until the next activation. Unique

equipment.name: Trophyᴹ
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Terrifying(-1)".

equipment.name: Waaagh!-Bannerᴹ
equipment.desc: The unit gains a bonus of +1 to Leadership and Combat resolutions. As long as the banner bearer is alive, Mission objectives that are held by this unit can not be contested by enemy units. Additionally, all models in the unot gain +1 Attack. Unique.

equipment.name: Waaagh!-Bike
equipment.desc: The model gets +6" Movement, +1 Toughness, +1 Wound, a Dakkagun and the unit type "Bike". Infantry only.

equipment.name: Waaagh!-Trike
equipment.desc: The model gets +6" Movement, +1 Toughness, +2 Wounds, three double-barreled Bummstikks, Kill jets and the unit type "Bike". Infantry only.

equipment.name: Wildorkᴹ
equipment.desc: The model receives the <Wildork> keyword and a 6+ invulnerability saving throw. Melee hit rolls against vehicles or monstrous creatures receive a +1 bonus and the "Lance(1)" ability.

equipment.name: Bionik Oiler
equipment.desc: The model gains a +1 bonus to its roll for Mek tools. Mek and Big Mek only.

equipment.name: Da Booma
equipment.desc: One weapon of the vehicle gains +12" range and +1 Strength. Vehicle only.

equipment.name: Eavy armour cabin
equipment.desc: Passengers receive the benefit of cover. Transport vehicle only.

equipment.name: Enhanced Runt-Sucker
equipment.desc: This model's Shokk attack gun changes its type to "Assault 2". Big Mek or Mek Junka only.

equipment.name: Extra-Kustom Weapon
equipment.desc: This model's Kustom mega-blasta changes its type to "Assault 2". Mek, Big Mek, and Spanna only.

equipment.name: Fortress on Wheels
equipment.desc: This model receives a 5+ invulnerability saving throw. Battlewagon and Battle Fortress only.

equipment.name: Gyroscopic Whirlygig
equipment.desc: When using Shokk Tunnel, this model only suffers a glancing hit if it rolls a 1 and does not suffer penetrating hits. Warbuggy only.

equipment.name: More Dakka
equipment.desc: Roll 1D6 when the unit is activated. On a 4+, the unit may fire an additional shot with a single weapon. Vehicle only.

equipment.name: Nitro Squigs
equipment.desc: All of this model's Squig Launchas receive +1 Strength and -1 AP. Warbuggy only.

equipment.name: Press the Button
equipment.desc:
Roll a die at the start of the model's activation. Vehicle only.
1-2: The model suffers a glancing hit.
3-4: The model receives the special rule "Deflagrate(5+)" for all weapons until the end of the battle round.
5-6: The model receives the special rule "Armor piercing(5+)" for all weapons until the end of the battle round.

equipment.name: Shokka Hull
equipment.desc: Attackers receive an automatic hit with S:4 AP:0 D:1 for each hit in the melee. Vehicle only.

equipment.name: Smoky Gubbinz
equipment.desc: If the unit has used a "Stand & Shoot" command in this battle round, it receives the "Deflect" special rule. Mek, Big Mek, and Spanna only.

equipment.name: Souped-up Speshul
equipment.desc: The model's Mek speshul weapon changes its type to "Assault 14". Warbuggy only.

equipment.name: Squig-hide Tyres
equipment.desc: The model ignores temporary engine damage. Non-walker or aircraft vehicle only.

equipment.name: Stompamatic Pistons
equipment.desc: The vehicle receives +2" Movement. Walker only.

equipment.name: Zzapkrumpaz
equipment.desc: This unit's melee weapons gain "Deadly(6+)". Spanna only.

equipment.name: Additional armor
equipment.desc: The model ignores the first "Crew Shaken" vehicle damage each round.

equipment.name: Armored hood
equipment.desc: The vehicle no longer counts as "Open".

equipment.name: Boarding plank
equipment.desc: All passengers in the vehicle can fight normally in melee and be targeted while in the transporter. Vehicles with the "Open" ability only.

equipment.name: Death roller
equipment.desc: The model resolves Tank Shock attacks with Strength 10.

equipment.name: Grab claw
equipment.desc: Roll 1D6 when an enemy vehicle is in base contact and is activated. It cannot move on 4+.

equipment.name: Grot mechanic
equipment.desc: At the start of its activation, the model can attempt to repair each "Engine damage" vehicle damage it suffered on rolls of 5+. On each roll of 1, it suffers one penetrating hit with AT(1).

equipment.name: Nozzle drive
equipment.desc: The vehicle can move an additional 1D6" with an Advance command. On a 1, the model suffers one permanent engine damage. This additional movement is not taken into account when determining how many weapons a vehicle can still fire, or how passengers can use their orders. Not for Walkers.

equipment.name: Red paint
equipment.desc: The vehicle receives +1" to its movement range. This additional movement is not taken into account when determining how many weapons a vehicle can still fire or how passengers can use their orders.

equipment.name: Reinforced battering ram
equipment.desc: The vehicle may re-roll dangerous terrain tests and ignores difficult terrain.

equipment.name: Smoke launcher
equipment.desc:
The model can use its Smoke Launcher once per game:
- During normal activation, instead of firing weapons.
- If it has not yet carried out its order this round and is targeted by an enemy unit. The order is consumed by doing so.
Enemy units can only deal glancing hits with ranged attacks until the next activation.

equipment.name: Stikkbombz launcha
equipment.desc: The vehicle receives an additional weapon: Stikkbombz launcha.

equipment.name: Target squig
equipment.desc: The model does not have to declare its ranged weapons at all targets before firing, and can choose a new target for each weapon.

equipment.name: Wrecking ball
equipment.desc: The model resolves Tank Shock attacks with Damage 2.

equipment.name: Da Best Armor Teef Can Buy
equipment.desc: The model gains a 3+ armor save and a 4+ invulnerable save. Unique. Bad Moons only.

equipment.name: Fasta Than Yooz
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain the "Frenzy(1")" and "Haste(1")" ability. Unique. Evil Suns only.

equipment.name: I've Got A Plan, Ladz!
equipment.desc: After all units have been placed in the Deployment phase, you may remove and redeploy two of your units. Unique. Blood Axes only.

equipment.name: Opportunist
equipment.desc: You gain an additional 0,25 Victory Points (VP) from secondary objectives. Unique. Deathskulls only.

equipment.name: Proper Killy
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Attack. Unique. Goffs only.

equipment.name: Surly As A Squiggoth
equipment.desc:
Roll a die the first time the model is eliminated. 
1,2 - Remove the model.
3,4 - Set it back up with 1 wound.
5,6 - Set it up again with 2 wounds. Unique. Snakebites only.

archetypes.name: Krumpa Kompany
archetypes.desc:
- The army only has access to the following units, regardless of other traits:
- Boss, Mek, Painboy
- Nobs
- Battlewagons, Deff Dreads
- Nobs can be taken as Troops.
- All models for which this is possible must be equipped with Mega armor.
- All units gain the "Objective secured!" ability.

archetypes.name: Speedfreaks
archetypes.desc:
- Stormboyz and Warbikers can be taken as Troops.
- All units with less than 12" Movement must start the game as passengers inside a transport.
- Units that have no transport option and less than 12" Movement cannot be taken at all.

legacies.name: Da ’ardest Boyz
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Goff in the Clan Armory.

legacies.name: Da Rich Boyz
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Bad Moons in the Clan Armory.

legacies.name: Da Sneaky Gitz
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Blood Axes in the Clan Armory.

legacies.name: Da Speedfreaks
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Evil Sunz in the Clan Armory.

legacies.name: Da Squig-Luvvas
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Snakebites in the Clan Armory.

legacies.name: Da Lootaz
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Deathskulls in the Clan Armory.

traits.name: 'orrible Gitz
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Deflect" ability. Only for Gretchins.

traits.name: Armed To Da Teeth
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Deflagrate(6+)" ability for all ranged attacks.

traits.name: Big Krumpaz
traits.desc: If the unit uses a Charge order or gets charged by an enemy unit, it gains +1 to melee hit rolls until the end of the current battle round.

traits.name: Big Red Button
traits.desc: Vehicle units can roll on the Ramshackle table at any time during their activation, roll 2D6 and pick any result while doing so. Explosions are resolved at Strength 7.

traits.name: Boom Boyz
traits.desc: Weapons with the "Barrage" or "Explosive" ability can hit up to one more model per unit.

traits.name: Flyboyz
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Deflect" ability. Only for Flyers.

traits.name: Lucky Gitz
traits.desc: The unit can re-roll one hit or wound roll per battle round.

traits.name: Mixed Warband
traits.desc: The army must select a second Legacy. Each model may only select items from one Legacy armory.

traits.name: No messing around here
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Rending(6+)" ability for all melee attacks.

traits.name: Pyromaniacs
traits.desc: All weapons with the "Flames" ability cause 1 additional hit.

traits.name: Rascals
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Sunder(1)" ability for all ranged attacks.

traits.name: Taktiks
traits.desc: The unit gains the benefit of light cover until its first activation.

traits.name: The Old Ways
traits.desc: If the unit uses a Charge order or gets charged by an enemy unit, it gains +1 Strength until the end of the current battle round.

traits.name: Waaagh! Coast Kustoms
traits.desc: Each Kustom job can be taken one additional time.

Waaagh!.name: Fists of Gork
Waaagh!.effect: The target gains +2 Strength and +2 Attacks.

Waaagh!.name: 'eadbanger
Waaagh!.effect: The target suffers one automatic hit with S: 8 AP: 0 D: 1; AT(2), Barrage, Seeking.

Waaagh!.name: Jabbin' Fingerz
Waaagh!.effect: The target receives a -1 penalty to hit rolls.

Waaagh!.name: Warpath
Waaagh!.effect: All models of the target gain +1 Attack.

Waaagh!.name: Da Jump
Waaagh!.effect: Remove the unit from the field and immediately redeploy it according to the rules for Deep strike. The command of the target unit is changed to "Move & Shoot" when it is activated. It already counts as having moved the maximum distance.

Waaagh!.name: Da Krunch
Waaagh!.effect: One automatic hit with S: D AP: -4 D: 3; AT(3), Seeking.
